'''Supply depot I-389''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply depot located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Sartar]] had a [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratory]] in the depot, where he supervised the development of [[Fire-Rain 3]], a deadly bio-agent. Sartar had planned to test his new weapon on the inhabitants of nearby [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] and [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], but was foiled when a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents managed to destroy all samples of the bio-agent, along with Sartar's lab.
